svg.title: How the browser picks a responsive image source
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the browser's decision process for picture, source, and srcset elements

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers the browser to pick a responsive image?')
sendPrompt('What is the picture element used for?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser evaluate source elements in order?')
sendPrompt('How does srcset work on a plain img tag?')
sendPrompt('What does the media attribute do on a source element?')
sendPrompt('How does type attribute help with WebP and AVIF?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser calculate which srcset entry to use?')
sendPrompt('What happens once the browser picks an image source?')
sendPrompt('How does the browser pick between srcset entries on a plain img?')
sendPrompt('When does the browser fall back to the src attribute?')
sendPrompt('What does the fallback img in picture do?')
